Button, CRC, serial debugging, GPIO, I2C, SPI, system flash, and watchdog functions for STM32.


## Files
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Implements button initialization, state checking, and self-test functions for STM32 hardware.
- **[crc.c](crc.c.md)**: Implements CRC calculation functions for STM32 microcontrollers, including CRC-8 and flash data support.
- **[dbgserial.c](dbgserial.c.md)**: Implements serial debugging for STM32 microcontrollers with initialization, data transmission, and logging.
- **[gpio.c](gpio.c.md)**: Functions for initializing and managing GPIO pins on STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[i2c.c](i2c.c.md)**: I2C driver implementation for STM32 microcontrollers, including bus configuration, data transfer, and interrupt handling.
- **[i2c_private.c](i2c_private.c.md)**: Functions for controlling and configuring I2C rail power for various hardware versions.
- **[spi.c](spi.c.md)**: Implements SPI prescaler calculation for STM32 microcontrollers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[system_flash.c](system_flash.c.md)**: Functions for erasing, writing, and reading system flash memory on STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Implements watchdog timer initialization, control, and reset flag management for STM32 microcontrollers.
